title: INTERNATIONAL INVESTMENT DISPUTE SETTLEMENT PROCEDURE
author: Akhtamova Yulduz Akhtamovna, Abdumannopov Khumoyun Mirzo Shokirjon ugli
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This resorch shows the investment disputes that arise within the framework of international investment law, types of investment disputes, countries where they are most common, investment dispute resolution mechanisms, good and bad effects of investment disputes on the economy.
steps_raw: This resorch shows the investment disputes that arise within the framework of international investment law, types of investment disputes, countries where they are most common, investment dispute resolution mechanisms, good and bad effects of investment disputes on the economy.
